reason: Low PBR is only Stage 1; ROE, net profit, EPS, and FCF durability drive Stage 2/3.
Buyback, cancellation, dividend, payout ratio, and total shareholder return must be executed, not merely expected.
CET1, K-ICS, PF exposure, reserves, and credit cost can block financial rerating.
Digital asset, stablecoin, IPO, exchange, and fintech options need approved regulation and revenue economics.
60D/120D MFE and relative strength separate early Stage 3 from late value-up chasing.
Financials need precise disclosure on cancellation, dividend, capital ratio, stake value, and security incidents.
PBR band expansion and financial-basket crowding reduce Stage 3 runway.
